subject: PhD Topology
instructions: For problems 1–5, state the following theorems. For problems 6–10, show all work and write clearly. The proofs should be detailed, leaving no doubt about the correctness!

problems.text: Schoenflies Theorem for \(R^2\). Does the corresponding statement hold for \(R^3\)? Explain.
What is the universal cover of \(P^2\)? Prove your answer.
Prove: Let \(C\) be the Cantor set, and let \(X\) be any compact metric space. Then there exists a continuous, surjective function \(f : C \to X\).
State and prove the Finite Simplicial Approximation Theorem.
Use the Seifert–van Kampen Theorem to compute the fundamental group of the Klein bottle.

subparts.label: (i)
subparts.text: What is \(\widetilde{H}_0(X)\), when \(X\) is a two point space? (Do not prove.)

subparts.label: (ii)
subparts.text: Use the Mayer–Vietoris sequence and (i) to compute the homology of \(S^n\), for \(n \ge 1\).
